title: Your Shy Giggle
description: The way you cover your face and laugh when I tell a silly joke. My absolute favorite view.

title: Sweet & Sour Cravings
description: Hunting for the perfect fresh green Juices during one of our spontaneous street food runs.

title: City Lights & You
description: The skyline was bright and beautiful that night, but my favorite view was still standing right next to me.

title: Ramen Date Nights
description: Warm bowls, steaming broth, and sharing crispy gyoza while talking about absolutely everything.

title: Spicy & Cozy Feasts
description: Enjoying the perfect combination of spicy soup and sweet noodles, making rainy days taste so much better.

title: Our Favorite Place
description: Hunting for the most delicious duck at our absolute favorite spot in Semanggi, Searching for the Best Bebek Madura dish. Xixi

title: The Best Alibi
description: Picking you up after work became my absolute favorite excuse just to take you on movie dates and eat delicious food at Kokas.

title: Our Perfect Sanctuary
description: Treating ourselves to a massage at the most relaxing and romantic place we've ever found, where the world stood still and all our worries melted away.

title: A Sweet Valentine
description: The special box of chocolates I gave you to celebrate Valentine's Day—a sweet little token for the sweetest person in my life.

title: The Most Beautiful View
description: The most beautiful woman in the world, standing in the most beautiful place—a view I could stare at forever.

title: Sweet Gelato Cheers
description: A sweet toast of melting gelato waffle cones on a warm evening—making ordinary nights feel so much more magical.

title: A New Horizon
description: Taking a little trip to explore PIK together, wandering around a beautiful new place we had never been to before.

title: A Day by the Vitamin Sea
description: Exploring Aloha Pasir Putih at PIK, holding hands under the palm trees and breathing in the ocean breeze.

title: Moments in Motion
description: Capturing your laughter in full motion, proving that some memories are just too lively for a static photo.

title: A Glimpse of Happiness
description: Just a few sweet seconds of your radiant smile, saved in motion to replay whenever I need a little warmth.

title: Our Shared Seconds
description: A tiny snippet of our beautiful journey, kept alive in moving frames to remind us of the joy we share.
